subject: fix(theme): remove hardcoded source color palette from DebugPill
body:
Replace 20-color SOURCE_COLORS palette with single DaisyUI info token.
The source name text already identifies each source — distinct colors
add no value for a temporary debug tool removed post-alpha.

Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
